transcript: Can you look at the camera for a sec? Nora? Oh my god, I'm so sorry. I was up late last night with my father, and I spent all day at the senior center. I mean, after my mom passed away from her illness and seeing what she went through with her own folks, I knew my father was going to need me. The people I help, they don't have anybody else. I'm so sorry Troy I'm sorry I'll finish your project and make you look nice okay I'm going to make it look nice. Okay. Thank you for watching!
